Appearances:
Plaintiff 1660 Bay Street LLC is present. Represented by Ann Rollandi.
Attorney Daniel Stern appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant John Bainter III is present.
Attorney Laura Blumenstein representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of Oct-22-2012 is vacated.(501/JPT)
